channel.title: Vscode on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Vscode on Arrans github.io

item.title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
item.description: FULL v0, Cursor, Manus, Same.dev, Lovable, Devin, Replit Agent, Windsurf Agent, VSCode Agent, Dia Browser & Trae AI (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Tools & AI Models.

item.title: continuedev/continue
item.description: ⏩ Create, share, and use custom AI code assistants with our open-source IDE extensions and hub of models, rules, prompts, docs, and other building blocks

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source & self-hostable Heroku / Netlify / Vercel alternative.

item.title: wix/import-cost
item.description: displays the import size of the package you are importing inside the code editor
